task_completion.description: Log in to the Rancher web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rancher dashboard is visible in the web browser, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'logistics' namespace in the cluster explorer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rancher UI shows the 'logistics' namespace selected in the top navigation bar or the namespace filter.
The Rancher UI shows the 'order-api' service with active endpoints (Target Pods > 0), or shows the agent successfully updating the service selector to match the 'order-api-deploy' pod labels.
The Rancher UI shows the 'tracking-svc' service with active endpoints (Target Pods > 0), or shows the agent successfully updating the service selector to match the 'tracking-deploy' pod labels.
The Rancher UI shows the 'inventory-svc' service with active endpoints (Target Pods > 0), or shows the agent successfully updating the service selector to match the 'inventory-deploy' pod labels.

The Rancher UI shows the 'notification-hub' service with active endpoints (Target Pods > 0), or shows the agent successfully updating the service selector to match the 'notification-deploy' pod labels.

integrity.description: The agent used the Rancher web GUI to diagnose and fix the issues.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Rancher web interface in a browser, rather than exclusively using 'kubectl' commands in a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely edited the service configurations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with Rancher's 'Edit Config' forms or YAML editor for the specific services, rather than just viewing static pages.

integrity.description: The agent fixed the selectors rather than manually creating fake endpoints.
integrity.visual_evidence: The fix involves changing the 'Selectors' field in the Service configuration, not manually creating Endpoint or EndpointSlice resources.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target namespace: 'logistics'. Target services to fix: 'order-api', 'tracking-svc', 'inventory-svc', 'notification-hub'. Corresponding deployments: 'order-api-deploy', 'tracking-deploy', 'inventory-deploy', 'notification-deploy'. A successful fix means the service selectors are updated to match the deployment pod labels, resulting in active endpoints (Target Pods > 0) for each service.
